2603.26097.title: Dynamic Tokenization via Reinforcement Patching: End-to-end Training and Zero-shot Transfer
2603.26097.paper_summary: Efficiently aggregating spatial or temporal horizons to acquire compact representations has become a unifying principle in modern deep learning models, yet learning data-adaptive representations for long-horizon sequence data, especially continuous sequences like time series, remains an open challenge. While fixed-size patching has improved scalability and performance, discovering variable-sized, data-driven patches end-to-end often forces models to rely on soft discretization, specific backbones, or heuristic rules. In this work, we propose Reinforcement Patching (ReinPatch), the first framework to jointly optimize a sequence patching policy and its downstream sequence backbone model using reinforcement learning. By formulating patch boundary placement as a discrete decision process optimized via Group Relative Policy Gradient (GRPG), ReinPatch bypasses the need for continuous relaxations and performs dynamic patching policy optimization in a natural manner. Moreover, our method allows strict enforcement of a desired compression rate, freeing the downstream backbone to scale efficiently, and naturally supports multi-level hierarchical modeling. We evaluate ReinPatch on time-series forecasting datasets, where it demonstrates compelling performance compared to state-of-the-art data-driven patching strategies. Furthermore, our detached design allows the patching module to be extracted as a standalone foundation patcher, providing the community with visual and empirical insights into the segmentation behaviors preferred by a purely performance-driven neural patching strategy.
2603.26097.paper_summary_zh: 有效地聚合空間或時間範疇以獲取緊湊的表示已成為現代深度學習模型中的統一原則，然而，為長期序列數據，特別是像時間序列這樣的連續序列學習數據自適應表示仍然是一個未解的挑戰。雖然固定大小的補丁改善了可擴展性和性能，但發現可變大小的數據驅動補丁端到端通常迫使模型依賴於軟離散化、特定骨幹或啟發式規則。在這項工作中，我們提出了強化補丁（ReinPatch），這是第一個使用強化學習共同優化序列補丁策略及其下游序列骨幹模型的框架。通過將補丁邊界放置形式化為一個通過群體相對策略梯度（GRPG）優化的離散決策過程，ReinPatch 繞過了對連續放鬆的需求，並以自然的方式執行動態補丁策略優化。此外，我們的方法允許嚴格執行所需的壓縮率，讓下游骨幹能夠高效擴展，並自然支持多層次的層次建模。我們在時間序列預測數據集上評估了 ReinPatch，結果顯示其相較於最先進的數據驅動補丁策略展現了引人注目的性能。此外，我們的獨立設計允許將補丁模塊提取為獨立的基礎補丁器，為社群提供了對純粹以性能為驅動的神經補丁策略所偏好的分割行為的視覺和實證見解。
2603.26097.author: Yulun Wu et.al.
2603.26097.authors: Yulun Wu, Sravan Kumar Ankireddy, Samuel Sharpe, Nikita Seleznev, Dehao Yuan, Hyeji Kim, Nam H. Nguyen
